nodes.plain:
A problem with quickboards, forcing the user to save to file somewhat defeats the purpose of making them really "quick"
I think what we need is this: an app level store. It creates quickboard-timestamp.wb.json and sets a flag 'transient' - the boards are autosaved on changes. Clicking the save tool will see there's the transient flag on and will prompt for an actual path. The transient board is then deleted.
